$description: Non-token system registries — dispatch tables the constitution names, kept beside the tokens (NOT DTCG data). Registries, not hierarchies: add a capability = add a row.

familyDirection.$comment: §7: direction is DERIVED from the invariant, never chosen freely. The validator checks monotonicity against the resolved direction per family × theme.
familyDirection.invariant: interaction moves toward ink — fills darken on light themes, lighten on dark

exceptions.cell: raise toward white on every theme (LrC matting; §7/§20)

funSites.$comment: §17: the fun layer is injected ONLY at registered sites; one per view, area-capped, never adjacent to stage or cells, static under reduced motion. ADMISSION = the wit rule (ratified 2026-07-13): the moment must reference its own meaning — art that doesn't know what's happening fails regardless of beauty. Recipe values are §30.8 PIN; library/fun-probe.html is the pinning instrument.

boot-splash.meaning: the Pharos greeting — the beam sweep IS the progress indicator (the lighthouse searching for your files)
boot-splash.constraint: art never costs a millisecond: duration = actual load; instant = skipped; full theatrical form only in naturally-slow moments (first-run, cold start)

hero-cta.meaning: the primary call-to-action (hero rung = fill + fun overlay, §4)
hero-cta.constraint: includes the press payoff: a one-shot bloom handing off visibly to the marquee; ordinary chrome stays dry

marquee-progress.meaning: the one long job the user is actively awaiting
marquee-progress.constraint: the light-bar is the marquee only; dots stay the ambient progress voice

announcement-sweep.meaning: something new exists here: one transient gradient lap around the thing's outline, then gone
announcement-sweep.constraint: runs once, never loops, never nags

slide-commit.meaning: deliberate commitment rendered physically: the glass tray + puck slid to start a heavyweight/irreversible operation
slide-commit.constraint: reserved for operations whose weight warrants friction

joy-moment.meaning: the §16 voids: empty states, first-run, completion, about
joy-moment.constraint: media per §16 (incl. dithered public-domain classical art, interactive dot art, illustrative skeuomorphism); never the user's photos

machinery.$comment: §14: domain state → dot-matrix loader (source: dot-matrix-animations.vercel.app, 60 loaders). Loader ids PIN pending selection (§30.8). Machinery is achromatic and visible only while working (§10).

map.loader: fun light-bar (§17, not a dot loader)

tagRecipes.$comment: Tag/badge style recipes (ratified 2026-07-13): style → which hue-scale steps, identical grammar for all 12 hues. 'outline' is the surface hybrid (border + wash) — a pure 1px colored border cannot carry a chip on light chrome. The compiler emits per-hue variables from these; components never assemble chips ad hoc.

rowIntents.$comment: The row grammar (ratified 2026-07-13): each intent binds a height to the type roles allowed inside it — density and type step down TOGETHER or not at all (body type in a 16px row is zero-slack; dense type in a 28px row is limp). The validator lints role-in-row violations. Density switches at section boundaries only (§8); horizontal insets identical across all intents.

hueEligibility.$comment: Capability rows (2026-07-13): which scales each user-pickable role may bind. Gray is tag-only (gray signal is no signal). Accent additionally gated by the ring contract per theme — a hue failing ring Lc on any theme is not offered.
